# Deterministic proof vault fixture: the vault is seeded with realistic notes
# covering normal content, a broken link, an orphan note, a note with incomplete
# metadata and a low-risk repair candidate. Doctor and plan commands must surface
# these CONCRETE issues and operations, and must never leak note bodies or secrets.

exec sh -c 'pinax init vault --title Vault --json > fixture_init.json'
validate-json-envelope fixture_init.json
grep '"status":"success"' fixture_init.json

# Index the seeded fixture vault.
exec sh -c 'pinax index sync --vault vault --json > fixture_index.json'
validate-json-envelope fixture_index.json
grep '"command":"index.sync"' fixture_index.json

# Doctor must surface the concrete seeded issues: a broken link, missing tags and
# orphan notes. These are real vault-health findings, not just envelope keys.
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --json > fixture_doctor.json'
validate-json-envelope fixture_doctor.json
grep '"command":"vault.doctor"' fixture_doctor.json
grep '"issues.total"' fixture_doctor.json
grep 'broken_link' fixture_doctor.json
grep 'missing_tags' fixture_doctor.json
grep 'orphan_note' fixture_doctor.json
grep 'broken-link-note.md' fixture_doctor.json
grep 'incomplete-metadata.md' fixture_doctor.json
grep 'orphan-root-note.md' fixture_doctor.json
! grep '"Authorization"' fixture_doctor.json

# Repair plan must produce concrete operations mapped to the seeded issues:
# automatic tags_patch for missing tags, manual_review orphan_review and
# link_resolution for the broken link.
exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --vault vault --json > fixture_repair_plan.json'
validate-json-envelope fixture_repair_plan.json
grep '"command":"repair.plan"' fixture_repair_plan.json
grep 'tags_patch' fixture_repair_plan.json
grep 'orphan_review' fixture_repair_plan.json
grep 'link_resolution' fixture_repair_plan.json
grep '"automatic"' fixture_repair_plan.json
grep '"manual_review"' fixture_repair_plan.json
! grep 'SECRET_FIXTURE_BODY' fixture_repair_plan.json

# Organize plan must propose a concrete move for the root-level orphan note into
# notes/, matching the seeded fixture structure.
exec sh -c 'pinax organize plan --vault vault --json > fixture_organize_plan.json'
validate-json-envelope fixture_organize_plan.json
grep '"kind":"move"' fixture_organize_plan.json
grep 'orphan-root-note.md' fixture_organize_plan.json
grep 'notes/orphan-root-note.md' fixture_organize_plan.json
! grep 'SECRET_FIXTURE_BODY' fixture_organize_plan.json

# Agent projection stays bounded on diagnose commands.
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --agent > fixture_doctor_agent.txt'
validate-agent-format fixture_doctor_agent.txt
grep 'command=vault.doctor' fixture_doctor_agent.txt
grep 'fact.issues.total' fixture_doctor_agent.txt
! grep 'SECRET_FIXTURE_BODY' fixture_doctor_agent.txt

# Deterministic fixture files with no committed secrets.
-- vault/notes/normal-note.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_normal_deterministic
title: Normal Note
tags: [reference]
kind: reference
status: active
created_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
updated_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
---

# Normal Note

Links to [[algorithms]].

-- vault/notes/algorithms.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_algorithms_deterministic
title: Algorithms
tags: [reference]
kind: reference
status: active
created_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
updated_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
---

# Algorithms

Referenced by normal note.

-- vault/notes/broken-link-note.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_broken_link_deterministic
title: Broken Link Note
tags: [reference]
kind: reference
status: active
created_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
updated_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
---

# Broken Link Note

This note links to [[nonexistent-target]] which does not exist.

-- vault/notes/incomplete-metadata.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_incomplete_deterministic
title: Incomplete Metadata
kind: note
status: active
created_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
updated_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
---

# Incomplete Metadata

Missing tags and kind is generic.

-- vault/orphan-root-note.md --
---
schema_version: pinax.note.v1
note_id: note_orphan_deterministic
title: Orphan Root Note
tags: [draft]
kind: note
status: active
created_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
updated_at: 2026-06-15T00:00:00Z
---

# Orphan Root Note

SECRET_FIXTURE_BODY lives here and must stay inside the note file only.
